creator: tamelingdaniel@gmail.com
text:
Just one suggestion on how to proceed: If we have something that works reasonably well, update the port and move the old patches to the *-legacy ports. That way we get more bug reports and can fix issues while people encountering those issues have an alternative that works.

That's how the jump from 5 to 6 was handled. The legacy ports are still at version 5, which is now completely outdated.
